headline: Your capital,
disciplined.
hero.body: We manage $3.2B+ across 400 families with one rule: your interests come first.

carouselCard.label: See how we structure capital allocation for each client

image.alt: Two advisors reviewing a portfolio in a warm, naturally-lit office
image.credit: Christina @ wocintechchat.com on Unsplash — placeholder until client delivers real photography

about.left: We are a fiduciary wealth manager. That means one thing: we are legally bound to act in your interest, not ours. No commissions. No product quotas. Fee-only compensation, disclosed in full before we begin.
about.right: Our team manages $3.2B+ in assets for over 400 families and institutions. Eighteen years of practice across three full market cycles have taught us that discipline beats prediction. We build portfolios around your complete financial picture: tax position, estate structure, liquidity needs, and time horizon. Every position, cost, and rationale is documented in plain language. You receive quarterly reports written for clarity, not compliance padding. When markets move, we call you before you call us.

approach.headline: Built for decades, not quarters
approach.body: Five principles govern every portfolio we manage. They are not guidelines. They are rules we enforce across every client, every cycle, without exception.

cards.title: Discipline
cards.body: Every portfolio follows a pre-committed risk budget. We enforce it across cycles, not abandon it in a drawdown.

cards.title: Transparency
cards.body: Fee-only compensation. Every position, cost, and rationale documented in plain English. No exceptions.

cards.title: Long horizon
cards.body: Strategy tuned for decades. Volatility is managed, never chased. Short-term noise is filtered out.

cards.title: Tax-efficient
cards.body: Asset location, loss harvesting, and lot-level optimisation built into every rebalance. Tax drag is a cost we treat seriously.

cards.title: Client-first
cards.body: SEC fiduciary standard. We answer to your outcome, never to a product shelf or internal revenue target.

servicesShowcase.headline: Six disciplines, one mandate
servicesShowcase.body: We keep every decision grounded in your full financial picture. Not siloed departments. Not referral chains. One team, six areas of practice.

cards.title: Wealth Planning
cards.description: Goal-based allocation and cash-flow modelling across a multi-decade horizon. We map every income source, expense, and liability before building a plan.

image.alt: Financial planning workspace with documents and a warm desk lamp

cards.title: Investment Management
cards.description: Diversified, evidence-based portfolios built around each client's risk budget. We rebalance quarterly and report every trade in plain language.

image.alt: Analyst workstation with market data on a warm-lit monitor

cards.title: Tax Strategy
cards.description: Asset location, loss harvesting, and multi-year optimisation built into every rebalance. We coordinate directly with your CPA to reduce drag.

image.alt: Calculator, pen and financial documents on a wooden desk

cards.title: Estate Planning
cards.description: Generational transfer structured in partnership with trust and estate counsel. We design the roadmap and coordinate the legal execution.

image.alt: Row of leather-bound legal reference books in warm library light

cards.title: Retirement Planning
cards.description: Drawdown sequencing, longevity risk modelling, and income floor construction. We stress-test each plan against 30 years of historical volatility.

image.alt: Glass-and-wood modern office building bathed in golden-hour light

cards.title: Business Exit Planning
cards.description: Pre-liquidity structuring and post-transaction wealth coordination. We work with your counsel to time the exit for the best tax outcome.

image.alt: Hands writing in a leather-bound notebook beside a laptop

servicesShowcase.note: Section 4 content placeholder — real services and photography TBD from client

servicesList.headline: Four ways to work with us
servicesList.body: Choose the depth of partnership that matches your situation. Every engagement starts with a free 30-minute review.

rows.title: Discretionary Management
rows.description: We take full authority over day-to-day portfolio decisions within a pre-agreed mandate. You set the boundaries. We execute, report, and adjust.

rows.title: Non-discretionary Advisory
rows.description: You remain the decision-maker. We provide analysis, recommendations, and implementation support on your schedule.

rows.title: Outsourced Family CFO
rows.description: Coordination across legal, tax, and operational partners for families with complex estates. One point of contact instead of six.

rows.title: Project-based Consulting
rows.description: Fixed-scope engagements: second opinions, wealth transitions, and portfolio audits. Clear deliverable, agreed fee, defined timeline.

caseStudies.headline: What discipline looks like
caseStudies.body: Six engagements, anonymised and compliance-reviewed. Each one shows how we approach a specific situation.

cards.title: Tech founder after exit
cards.description: Converted a concentrated stock position into a diversified portfolio through staged liquidation. Tax-loss harvesting saved the client six figures in the first year.

image.alt: Boardroom table with notebooks and coffee cups in warm afternoon light

cards.title: Family estate coordination
cards.description: Built a trust structure with three generational tiers and coordinated five external partners. The 30-year transfer roadmap is now in its third year of execution.

image.alt: Coastal estate at golden hour, architectural silhouette against the water

cards.title: Physician retirement plan
cards.description: Redesigned the defined-contribution plan and aligned the benefit structure with ownership equity. Administrative overhead dropped by 40%.

image.alt: Stethoscope resting on medical case notes beside a cup of tea

cards.title: Non-profit endowment
cards.description: Rewrote the investment policy statement and introduced mission-aligned allocation. Quarterly governance reviews now run on a fixed cadence.

image.alt: Row of scholarly hardback books on a study shelf in warm interior light

cards.title: International relocation
cards.description: Restructured assets ahead of a residency change across three jurisdictions. Optimised timing for currency exposure, tax treatment, and estate law differences.

image.alt: View from an airplane window above a sunlit cloud layer at altitude

cards.title: Founder equity hedge
cards.description: Put a collar strategy in place to protect a concentrated stock position during a lock-up period. The client kept upside participation while capping downside risk.

image.alt: Abstract modern skyscraper geometry photographed against a warm sky

midpageBanner.headline: One standard: yours.
midpageBanner.note: Approved by copywriter — fiduciary positioning statement

testimonials.headline: What clients say
testimonials.sidebar: All reviews are published with client permission and available on the founder's LinkedIn profile.

process.headline: Four steps. No shortcuts.
process.body: Every engagement follows the same structure. We start with your full financial picture and build from there.

steps.label: Discovery
steps.description: We audit your current holdings, tax position, estate documents, and goals. This takes one to two meetings.

steps.label: Strategy
steps.description: Our team builds a written plan matched to your risk tolerance, time horizon, and liquidity needs.

steps.label: Execution
steps.description: We implement the plan, handle all transfers, and coordinate with your CPA and counsel.

steps.label: Review
steps.description: Quarterly performance reports. Annual plan reviews. We rebalance when the data says to, not on a calendar.

contact.headline: Start with a conversation
contact.body: Tell us about your situation in a few sentences. We read every message and respond within one business day.
contact.successBody: We will respond within one business day from the address you provided.

footer.tagline: Fee-only fiduciary wealth management for investors who value clarity over complexity. $3.2B+ under management. 400+ families served.
footer.legal: Template Design operates under SEC fiduciary standards. All recommendations prioritise your interests. Past performance does not indicate future results. Securities offered through our registered partner.
